basic_details.job_title: Telangana AWT Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 64 Anganwadi Teacher Posts in Peddapalli District
basic_details.organization_name: Women Development & Child Welfare Peddapalli District
basic_details.short_information: Important: Applications submitted in person or at Prajawani offices will not be considered. Only online submissions via the official portal are accepted.

how_to_apply: All eligible women candidates must apply only through the official online portal. The official notification explicitly states that applications submitted offline or through Prajawani offices will not be accepted under any circumstances.
Follow these steps to submit your application for the Peddapalli Anganwadi Teacher 2026 recruitment:
Step 1 – Visit the Official Portal Go to http://wdcw.tg.nic.in — the official website of the Women Development and Child Welfare Department, Telangana.
Step 2 – Find the Recruitment Notification Look for the Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification for Peddapalli district (Notification No. B/114/2026-I / II / III).
Step 3 – Register / Login Create a new account or log in with existing credentials to begin the application process.

Step 4 – Select the AWC and Post Choose the specific Anganwadi Centre (AWC) and ICDS project (Manthani / Peddapalli / Ramagundam-U) for which you are applying, based on your category and location preference.
Step 5 – Fill Application Form Provide accurate personal, educational, and other required details. Upload all necessary documents.
Step 6 – Submit Before Deadline Ensure your application is submitted before July 6, 2026 by 5:00 PM. Late or incomplete submissions will not be entertained.
Note: The District Collector, Peddapalli holds full authority to cancel, amend, or modify this notification. Candidates should check the official website regularly for any updates or corrigendum.

content_sections.heading: Telangana Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026 - PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised to download the official vacancy notification PDFs for complete and accurate information. The official scanned vacancy lists issued by the District Welfare Officer, W.C.D. & S.C., Peddapalli are the authoritative source documents. Official Notification (Vacancy List – All Projects): Check Here Notification Numbers: B/114/2026-I (Manthani), B/114/2026-II (Peddapalli), B/114/2026-III (Ramagundam U) Download the PDF from the official WCD Telangana portal and cross-verify the AWC ID, AWC name, and your reservation category before submitting your application.

tables.caption: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - District Wise Vacancy List

content_sections.heading: Project-wise Vacancy Breakdown – Total 64 Posts
content_sections.text: The 64 Anganwadi Teacher vacancies in Peddapalli are distributed across three ICDS projects. Each project serves a specific geographic area within the district, and vacancies within each project are reserved for specific social categories. Here is the complete project-wise count.

content_sections.heading: Complete Vacancy List – ICDS Project Manthani (43 Posts)
content_sections.text: The Manthani project has the highest number of vacancies with 43 Anganwadi Teacher posts spread across various Anganwadi Centres (AWCs). Each post is reserved for a specific category. Below is the complete list of all 43 vacancies under the Manthani project.

content_sections.heading: Complete Vacancy List – ICDS Project Peddapalli (17 Posts)
content_sections.text: The Peddapalli ICDS project has 17 Anganwadi Teacher vacancies. All 17 are AWT positions with no AWH (Anganwadi Helper) vacancies listed. The reservation categories span across OC, SC, BC, EWS, VH, and Ex-Servicemen.

content_sections.heading: Complete Vacancy List – ICDS Project Ramagundam (U) (4 Posts)
content_sections.text: The Ramagundam (U) ICDS project under Peddapalli district has 4 Anganwadi Teacher vacancies. These cover AWC centres in the Ramagundam urban area, with reservation for OC and reserved communities. Anganwadi Vacancy 2026: Apply Online for Anganwadi (ICDS) Posts

content_sections.heading: Category-wise Distribution of All 64 Vacancies
content_sections.text: Understanding how vacancies are distributed across reservation categories helps candidates identify positions they are eligible for. content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online – Peddapalli Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: All eligible women candidates must apply only through the official online portal . The official notification explicitly states that applications submitted offline or through Prajawani offices will not be accepted under any circumstances. Follow these steps to submit your application for the Peddapalli Anganwadi Teacher 2026 recruitment: Step 1 – Visit the Official Portal Go to http://wdcw.tg.nic.in — the official website of the Women Development and Child Welfare Department, Telangana. Step 2 – Find the Recruitment Notification Look for the Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification for Peddapalli district (Notification No. B/114/2026-I / II / III). Step 3 – Register / Login Create a new account or log in with existing credentials to begin the application process. Step 4 – Select the AWC and Post Choose the specific Anganwadi Centre (AWC) and ICDS project (Manthani / Peddapalli / Ramagundam-U) for which you are applying, based on your category and location preference. Step 5 – Fill Application Form Provide accurate personal, educational, and other required details. Upload all necessary documents. Step 6 – Submit Before Deadline Ensure your application is submitted before July 6, 2026 by 5:00 PM . Late or incomplete submissions will not be entertained. Note: The District Collector, Peddapalli holds full authority to cancel, amend, or modify this notification. Candidates should check the official website regularly for any updates or corrigendum.

faq.question: Q1. How many total Anganwadi Teacher vacancies are there in Peddapalli district in 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 64 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) vacancies in Peddapalli district under three ICDS projects — Manthani (43), Peddapalli (17), and Ramagundam Urban (4).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Peddapalli Anganwadi Teacher Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is July 6, 2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications received after this deadline will not be considered.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for Peddapalli AWT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only through the official WCD Telangana portal at http://wdcw.tg.nic.in. Offline or Prajawani office submissions will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for Peddapalli Anganwadi Teacher posts?
faq.answer: Only women candidates from eligible categories are invited to apply. Eligibility criteria including educational qualifications, age limits, and other conditions are available on the official website http://wdcw.tg.nic.in.

faq.question: Q5. Which ICDS projects have vacancies in Peddapalli 2026?
faq.answer: Three ICDS projects have vacancies - Project Manthani (43 posts), Project Peddapalli (17 posts), and Project Ramagundam Urban (4 posts).

faq.question: Q6. Are there vacancies for reserved category candidates?
faq.answer: Yes. Vacancies are reserved across multiple categories including SC Group-I, SC Group-II, SC Group-III, ST, BC-A through BC-E, EWS, Ex-Servicemen/OC, VH (Visually Handicapped), and HH (Hearing Handicapped), in addition to OC (Open Category) posts.

faq.question: Q7. Are AWH (Anganwadi Helper) vacancies also available?
faq.answer: Based on the official vacancy notification, all 64 positions are AWT (Anganwadi Teacher) vacancies. The AWH vacancy column shows "No" for all listed positions, meaning no Anganwadi Helper vacancies are part of this current notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the notification number for Peddapalli Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification numbers are B/114/2026-I (Manthani project), B/114/2026-II (Peddapalli project), and B/114/2026-III (Ramagundam Urban project), all dated June 18, 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply offline or submit application at Prajawani?
faq.answer: No. The official notification clearly states that applications submitted at Prajawani offices or through any offline mode will not be considered. Only online submissions via http://wdcw.tg.nic.in are valid.

faq.question: Q10. Who has the authority to cancel or modify this notification?
faq.answer: The District Collector / Chairperson, Peddapalli District holds full authority to cancel, modify, or amend the notification at any time. Candidates are advised to regularly check the official website for updates.
